title: Thai Sweet Potato Skillet
description: A flavorful and easy Thai-inspired dish made with sweet potatoes, crispy ingredients, and a hint of Spanish spice.

ingredients.name: Crispy Ingredients
ingredients.notes: crushed fried onions or crispy fried shallots

ingredients.name: Spanish Spice
ingredients.notes: ground cumin, smoked paprika, and chili powder

instructions: Heat the skillet over medium heat.
Add vegetable oil and swirl to coat the pan.
Add diced sweet potatoes and cook for 5 minutes, or until slightly tender.
Add Spanish spice and stir to combine.
Add crispy ingredients and stir to combine.
Continue cooking for an additional 5-7 minutes, or until sweet potatoes are tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped cilantro if desired.
